item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses adding another entrance verifier, recognizes the repeated pattern of prior manual downstream gates, moves the issue upstream to a recurring entrance-control/process ownership failure, and proposes consolidating the defects under upstream rule attribution rather than adding a new human check."}
